query:
ALTER TABLE claims 
ADD COLUMN workflow_state ENUM('created', 'assigned', 'under_assessment', 'internal_review', 'technical_approval', 'financial_decision', 'payment_authorized', 'closed', 'disputed') DEFAULT 'created' AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN fraud_risk_level ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high') AFTER fraud_flags,
ADD COLUMN requires_gm_consultation TINYINT DEFAULT 0 AFTER fraud_risk_level;
